recommendations.title: The Forgotten Battle
recommendations.overview: During WWII's crucial Battle of the Scheldt, the lives of a glider pilot, a Nazi soldier and a reluctant Resistance recruit tragically intersect.

recommendations.title: 1942: Unknown Battle
recommendations.overview: WWII 1942: Rzhev, USSR. Stuck in a crucial strategical position, a small company from the Red Army does whatever it takes to fend off the Nazis.

recommendations.title: X-Men: Days of Future Past
recommendations.overview: The ultimate X-Men ensemble fights a war for the survival of the species across two time periods as they join forces with their younger selves in an epic battle that must change the past – to save our future.

recommendations.title: White Tiger
recommendations.overview: WWII, 1945. After barely surviving a battle with a mysterious, ghostly-white German Tiger tank, Red Army Sergeant Ivan Naydenov becomes obsessed with its destruction.

recommendations.title: Against the Sun
recommendations.overview: A WWII pilot, bombardier, and radioman find themselves adrift on a lifeboat without food or water after being forced to ditch their plane during a scouting mission.

recommendations.title: Escape from Sobibor
recommendations.overview: The true story of WWII's notorious Sobibor Nazi death camp, where a courageous inmate orchestrates and leads the escape of over 300 prisoners.

recommendations.title: Enemy at the Gates
recommendations.overview: A Russian and a German sniper play a game of cat-and-mouse during the Battle of Stalingrad in WWII.

recommendations.title: The Man Who Killed Hitler and Then the Bigfoot
recommendations.genres: Drama, Adventure, Fantasy, Science Fiction, War
recommendations.overview: Decades after serving in WWII and assassinating Adolf Hitler, a legendary American war veteran must now hunt down the fabled Bigfoot.

recommendations.title: The Young Lions
recommendations.overview: The lives of three young men, a German and two Americans, during WWII.

recommendations.title: Kingdom III: The Flame of Destiny
recommendations.overview: To defend their kingdom against a sudden invasion, a mighty general returns to the battlefield alongside a war orphan, now grown up, who dreams of glory.
